scripts.dev: npm run build && netlify dev --dir outputs --functions netlify/functions --port 8888
scripts.check: node --check assets/site.js && node --check netlify/functions/create-square-checkout.js && node --check netlify/functions/square-payment-webhook.js && node --check scripts/build-site.js && node --check scripts/ensure-env.js && node --check scripts/test-discord-notification.js
